text.language: Stand in the fear of God and listen to the Holy Gospel. A reading from the Gospel according to our teacher Saint [AUTHOR] the Evangelist. May his blessing be with us. Amen.

language.div: Berdirilah dalam takut akan Allah, dan dengarlah Injil Kudus, Pasal dari Injil guru kita Penginjil [AUTHOR], murid yang tahir. Kiranya berkat-berkatnya beserta kita, Amin.

text.language: قفوا بخوف الله لسماع الإنجيل المقدس فصل من بشارة الأنجيل لمعلمنا [AUTHOR] البشير بركته علينا آمين.
